name: semantic-fold
description: Policy-driven code folding for VS Code

commands.title: Semantic Fold: Toggle Methods in Classes
Semantic Fold: Toggle Functions in Classes
Semantic Fold: Toggle Functions in Variables

semanticFold.semanticRefinement.enabled.description: Enable semantic-token refinement for weak or ambiguous symbol classifications. When disabled, Semantic Fold uses only document symbols and folding ranges.

semanticFold.presets.imports.description: Override the imports preset. Use enabled:false to disable the preset command for this scope.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the imports preset command.

filter.description: Filter override for the imports preset. Supports the same fields as generic command filters.

semanticFold.presets.comments.description: Override the comments preset. Use enabled:false to disable the preset command for this scope.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the comments preset command.

filter.description: Filter override for the comments preset. Supports the same fields as generic command filters.

semanticFold.presets.readerMode.description: Override the Reader Mode preset. Use enabled:false to disable the preset command for this scope.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Reader Mode preset command.

filter.description: Filter override for Reader Mode. Supports the same fields as generic command filters.

semanticFold.presets.apiOverview.description: Override the API Overview preset. Use enabled:false to disable the preset command for this scope.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the API Overview preset command.

filters.description: Composite filter overrides for API Overview. Each entry supports the same fields as generic command filters.

semanticFold.presets.languageOverrides.description: Per-language preset overrides keyed by language id (for example typescript, javascript, python).

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
